searchBy.title: Search By
searchBy.description: Choose the field to search entities by.

nameSearch.title: Name / ID Search
nameSearch.description: Entity name, DOS ID, or assumed name to search for. Leave blank to retrieve all entities of a given type (slow — alphabetical sweep is used).

nameType.title: Active Only
nameType.description: When enabled, only searches active entity names. When disabled, searches both active and inactive names.

searchType.title: Search Type
searchType.description: How to match the entity name: begins with the text, contains the text anywhere, or sounds like it (phonetic).

entityType.title: Entity Type
entityType.description: Filter results by business entity type. Leave blank for all types.

startDate.title: Start Date (Filing Date)
startDate.description: Return only entities with a filing date on or after this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD. Used for date-range and 'most recently created' searches.

endDate.title: End Date (Filing Date)
endDate.description: Return only entities with a filing date on or before this date. Format: YYYY-MM-DD.

county.title: County
county.description: Filter results to a specific NY county (e.g. NEW YORK, KINGS, QUEENS, NASSAU). Case-insensitive.

statusFilter.title: Status Filter
statusFilter.description: Filter entities by their current status. Leave blank to return all statuses.

scrapeDetails.title: Scrape Full Details
scrapeDetails.description: Visit each entity's full detail page to extract registered agent, principal office, officer names, filing history, and merger/assumed name history. Slower but more complete.

maxResults.title: Max Results
maxResults.description: Maximum number of entity records to return. The NY DOS site caps search results at 500 per query; this actor paginates automatically for larger result sets.

proxyConfiguration.title: Proxy Configuration
proxyConfiguration.description: Apify proxy settings. The NY DOS site requires residential proxies to bypass its WAF. 'RESIDENTIAL' is strongly recommended.
